freelance-nebenberuf-steuern.description: Freelance/side-job tax rules. Covers the CHF 2,300 AHV threshold, how to declare freelance income, deductible expenses, and documentation standards.
freelance-nebenberuf-steuern.use_when: Taxpayer has self-employment or freelance income.

homeoffice-fahrkosten-optimierung.description: Home office vs. commute deduction trade-off. Explains when home office deduction (CHF 3/day) is worth claiming vs. keeping full commuting deduction. Includes break-even formula.
homeoffice-fahrkosten-optimierung.use_when: Taxpayer works from home part-time and has commuting costs.

kinderbetreuung-abzug-maximum.description: Childcare cost deduction caps. Zurich cantonal max = CHF 10,100 per child. Covers qualifying expenses, age limits, and distinction from Kinderabzug.
kinderbetreuung-abzug-maximum.use_when: Taxpayer has children and childcare expenses.

krankheitskosten-schwelle-5-prozent.description: Medical expense deduction rules. Only deductible if total exceeds 5% of net income. Formula: deductible = total medical costs - (5% x net income).

krypto-steuern-privat-professionell.description: Crypto tax rules for Zurich. Private investors pay wealth tax only (no income tax on gains). Covers when trading becomes 'professional', how to declare crypto wealth.

policy_kb.description: Zurich tax policy reference (Wegleitung). Authoritative rules covering income classification (Lohnausweis fields, Dienstaltersgeschenke, Spesen, pensions, dividends, capital gains, alimony), deductions (Berufsauslagen Pauschale, Fahrkosten/Velo-Pauschale, Pillar 3a, Kinderbetreuung, medical 5% threshold, Zweiverdienerabzug), property (Eigenmietwert, Steuerwert, mortgage), wealth (Dec 31 valuations, Wertschriftenverzeichnis), and filing status (divorce, Quellensteuer transition).
policy_kb.use_when: Default reference for any filing decision — consult for field-level rules, thresholds, caps, and avoiding double-counting.

pensionierung-kapital-rente.description: Retirement income tax rules. Covers AHV/BVG pensions, capital withdrawals, Freizuegigkeitskonto, and how each is taxed differently. Capital withdrawals taxed separately at reduced rate.
pensionierung-kapital-rente.use_when: Taxpayer receives pension income or has made capital withdrawals.

quellensteuer-wechsel-ordentlich.description: Switching from Quellensteuer to ordinary tax filing (e.g. after receiving C permit). Full-year rule: declare entire year's income even if permit changed mid-year.

scheidung-unterhalt-steuern.description: Divorce/separation tax rules. Critical distinction: spousal support IS taxable income, child support is NOT. Covers Kinderabzug after divorce, single-parent deduction.
scheidung-unterhalt-steuern.use_when: Taxpayer is divorced/separated or pays/receives alimony.

velo-pauschale-fahrkosten.description: Bicycle/Velo-Pauschale commuting deduction. CHF 700 flat deduction in Zurich. Can be combined WITH public transport costs (e.g. ZVV pass + CHF 700). IMPORTANT: Must ALWAYS be added to commuting costs (Fahrkosten) for any employed taxpayer.

verrechnungssteuer-rueckerstattung.description: Withholding tax (Verrechnungssteuer) refund rules. 35% withheld on Swiss investment income. Refunded automatically if income is declared honestly on tax return.
verrechnungssteuer-rueckerstattung.use_when: Taxpayer has Swiss bank interest or dividends.
